title: Aberdeen's Competitive Landscape — CP 100 Builds
author: Peter S. Kastner / Aberdeen Group
subject_domain: IT market research; competitive landscape visualization; analyst firm positioning
abstract: Seven-slide Aberdeen Group presentation consisting entirely of 'Aberdeen's Competitive Landscape' charts (CP 100 Builds format). Each slide appears to be a build step in the same competitive positioning diagram, progressively revealing Aberdeen's competitive landscape. Mostly graphical with minimal extractable text — text content is limited to the slide title repeated seven times. The visual content would show Aberdeen's market position relative to Gartner, IDC, Forrester, Meta Group, and other IT analyst firms.
importance_rationale: Mostly graphical; minimal extractable text content; visual competitive positioning chart with 7 build steps
relevance_rationale: Shows Aberdeen's competitive landscape visualization approach; complements textual descriptions in other documents
prescience_rationale: Graphical-only document with no forward-looking analysis extractable from text
